rationale_summary: Favor risk-on, momentum, and semiconductor-linked exposures over broad market beta. The allocation is intentionally aggressive because scoring rewards one-week realized return relative to the S&P 500 rather than risk-adjusted stability.
portfolio_rationale: The portfolio concentrates in the strongest short-term leadership areas: semiconductors, Korea/Taiwan chip-linked equities, momentum, and a small crypto sleeve. With a Fed hold heavily priced and yields recently declining, high-beta growth and AI-linked assets have the best chance to outperform SPY over the one-week window.
key_risks: A hawkish FOMC statement or press conference could reverse the recent decline in yields and pressure high-multiple technology and crypto assets.; Semiconductors and Korea/Taiwan exposures are crowded after very strong trailing gains, creating risk of sharp profit-taking during the scoring week.; Weak retail sales, industrial production, or jobless claims data could trigger a broad risk-off move that hurts high-beta equities more than SPY.; Geopolitical or trade-related headlines affecting Taiwan, Korea, or chip supply chains could disproportionately hurt the portfolio.; Crypto momentum could reverse independently of equities due to ETF outflows, regulatory headlines, or liquidity-driven selling.

rationale_summary: Lean into the strongest trending risk assets (semis, momentum, small caps) supported by disinflation and lower rates into the June FOMC.
portfolio_rationale: Cooling core inflation, falling Treasury yields, low VIX, and a near-certain FOMC hold support a risk-on tilt toward momentum and growth/semiconductor leadership for the one-week window.
key_risks: Hawkish FOMC dot-plot or Powell tone on 6/17 could spike yields and hit growth/semis hardest; Momentum and semiconductor crowding makes the book vulnerable to a sharp factor reversal; Hot retail sales (6/17) or sticky energy CPI could reignite inflation fears; Concentration in high-beta tech and small caps amplifies any broad risk-off move

rationale_summary: Momentum continuation in semis, Korea, and momentum factor plus small-value breadth, hedged with gold given safe-haven flows and FOMC event risk.
portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward semiconductor/momentum leadership and rate-sensitive small-cap value into an expected FOMC hold with cooling core inflation and falling yields, with a gold position hedging against the apparent geopolitical stress signaled by the spike in gold/silver and drop in oil.
key_risks: Hawkish FOMC dots or Powell commentary on 4.2% headline CPI could hit high-beta momentum names; Sharp reversal of crowded semiconductor/Korea trade after large recent gains; Gold spike fading if geopolitical stress de-escalates, dragging the hedge negative; Weak May retail sales (6/17) hurting small-cap value; Factor rotation away from momentum into laggards

rationale_summary: Disinflationary core CPI print plus dovish FOMC hold setup with falling yields supports growth, semis, small caps, and regional banks for the week.
portfolio_rationale: Cooler core CPI and falling yields ahead of June 17 FOMC favor rate-sensitive and growth-tilted equities. Tilt toward semis/momentum with small-cap and regional bank exposure to capture domestic rate-relief beta.
key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 reversing yield decline; Semiconductor profit-taking after large run-up; Headline CPI re-acceleration via energy weighing on sentiment; Geopolitical shock to Taiwan exposure

rationale_summary: Recent inflation data and scheduled FOMC meeting favor selective equity exposure over broad benchmark; momentum and small caps show strongest near-term price action.
portfolio_rationale: Overweight momentum and small-cap factors with semiconductor tilt to capture recent breadth and growth signals before FOMC decision.
key_risks: FOMC decision on June 17 could trigger volatility if hawkish on 4.2% CPI YoY; Hotter-than-expected retail sales on June 17 may pressure rate-sensitive small caps; BOJ meeting June 14-15 risks yen-driven global equity rotation away from US momentum

rationale_summary: Balanced portfolio with equity and short-duration fixed income.
portfolio_rationale: A balanced approach combining broad market exposure with a growth tilt and a cash-like buffer.
key_risks: Unexpected inflation data causing a spike in interest rates.; A sudden shift in market sentiment away from growth stocks.; Geopolitical events impacting global markets.
